headline: PulteGroup (PHM) Valuation Check After Mixed Short Term Returns And Slower Momentum
summary: What PulteGroup’s recent performance tells you PulteGroup (PHM) has been moving in different directions across timeframes, with the stock up 1.2% on the day and 6.1% over the past week, but down 7.6% over the past month. See our latest analysis for PulteGroup. Looking beyond the recent pullback, PulteGroup’s 1 year total shareholder return of 18.11% and 3 year total shareholder return of 80.82% contrast with weaker 3 month and year to date share price returns.
